penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out and freed from the gauze by the end of the video sequence.

reasoning: Critical disagreement on task completion. Claude identified incomplete circle cut-out (task failure), while GPT reported successful completion with minor line deviations. Given that incomplete_circle is an automatic zero condition in the rubric, and Claude's assessment is more conservative regarding the fundamental task requirement, the incomplete_circle penalty takes precedence over line deviation penalties.
